name: @wy51ai/edulab
description: A Claude Code plugin: a collection of education skills that turn academic problems into interactive lesson web pages. Skills: edu-solid-geometry (solid geometry, coordinate+vector method, 3D Three.js + MathJax), edu-analytic-geometry (conic sections, exact sympy-driven solutions with a live interactive 2D Canvas board + KaTeX), and edu-chem-reaction (microscopic 3D chemistry reaction demos — sympy-balanced, atom-conservation morph + mechanism engines, Three.js + KaTeX).
author: WY (@akokoi1) (https://x.com/akokoi1)
